text: Paris is the capital of France.
The Moon is Earth's only natural satellite.
An agent loop is a control loop: decide -> act -> observe -> update state -> repeat until done.
RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) retrieves relevant documents and uses them as context to ground an answer.
ReAct alternates reasoning and tool use: reason -> act (tool) -> observe -> reason -> ...
Guardrails are policy checks on inputs, outputs, and tool calls; tripwires can block or escalate risky actions.
